content.problemStatement:
Consider an array BBB of length MMM.

We define the prefix maximum array of array BBB, F(B)F(B)F(B), as an array CCC of length MMM such that Ci=max‚Ā°(B1,B2,‚Ä¶Bi)C_i=\max(B_1, B_2, \ldots B_i)Ci‚Äč=max(B1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶Bi‚Äč).

Stack had a permutation PPP of length 2‚čÖN2 \cdot N2‚čÖN. He deleted the last NNN elements from PPP to obtain an array PPP of size NNN.

Stack performs the following step for **all** permutations QQQ of length 2‚čÖN2 \cdot N2‚čÖN :


Check whether Qi=PiQ_i = P_iQi‚Äč=Pi‚Äč for all 1‚Č§i‚Č§N1 \leq i \leq N1‚Č§i‚Č§N;
If the above condition is true, insert F(Q)F(Q)F(Q) in set ZZZ.
Find the resultant size of set ZZZ.

Since the value might be large, please print it modulo 998244353998244353998244353.

Note that a permutation of length 2‚čÖN2\cdot N2‚čÖN contains all integers from 111 to 2‚čÖN2\cdot N2‚čÖN exactly once.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN ‚ÄĒ the current length of permutation PPP.
The next line contains NNN space-separated integers P1,P2,‚Ä¶PNP_1, P_2, \ldots P_NP1‚Äč,P2‚Äč,‚Ä¶PN‚Äč representing the first NNN elements of PPP.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the size of set ZZZ modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: Pi‚Č†PjP_i \neq P_jPi‚ÄčÓÄ†=Pj‚Äč for 1‚Č§i<j‚Č§N1 \leq i \lt j \leq N1‚Č§i<j‚Č§N
The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10610^6106.
